name: ouigoh
description: Ouigoh - online multiplayer 3rd-person skill-based melee combat

scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.build:client: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w client
scripts.build:server: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w client && npm run typecheck -w server
